easy.title: Semantic Page Recreation
easy.description:
Take a non-semantic page (using only divs) and convert it to proper semantic HTML.

---

Create a blog post page using full semantic HTML5 elements.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Semantic Page Recreation</title>
</head>
<body>
  
</body>
</html>
